title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Ambuja Cements - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Ambuja Cements - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Ambuja Cements are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Ambuja Cements:
Ambuja Cements is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ambuja Cements!
